interaction_phrase: hosted by the Institute for Advanced Computer Science (IACS) at Stony Brook
occurrence_sentence: At the latest SPIR Lunch and Learn event hosted by the Institute for Advanced Computer Science (IACS) at Stony Brook University, Dr. Marianna Bonanome, Head of External Education Programs at SandboxAQ, went into the future of quantum computing and its implications for the digital world.
